scripts.dev:full: sh -c 'ML_PID=; if lsof -i:5050 >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "ML server already running on :5050, reusing it"; else npm run ml:server:dev & ML_PID=$!; fi; trap "if [ -n \"$ML_PID\" ]; then kill $ML_PID 2>/dev/null || true; fi" EXIT INT TERM; npm run tauri:d'
scripts.ml:server:dev: cd integrations/jacbz-lofi && MLPY=../../.venv-ml311/bin/python; [ -x "$MLPY" ] || MLPY=../../.venv-ml/bin/python; [ -x "$MLPY" ] || MLPY=$(command -v python3); "$MLPY" -m flask --app=server/app.py run --host=0.0.0.0 --port=5050
scripts.ml:server:docker: docker build -f integrations/jacbz-lofi/server/Dockerfile -t lofi-ml integrations/jacbz-lofi && docker run --rm -p 5000:5000 lofi-ml
scripts.ml:model:lofi2lofi:train: cd integrations/jacbz-lofi && MLPY=../../.venv-ml311/bin/python; [ -x "$MLPY" ] || MLPY=../../.venv-ml/bin/python; [ -x "$MLPY" ] || MLPY=$(command -v python3); "$MLPY" -m model.lofi2lofi_train
scripts.ml:model:lyrics2lofi:embeddings: cd integrations/jacbz-lofi && MLPY=../../.venv-ml311/bin/python; [ -x "$MLPY" ] || MLPY=../../.venv-ml/bin/python; [ -x "$MLPY" ] || MLPY=$(command -v python3); "$MLPY" -m model.embeddings
scripts.ml:model:lyrics2lofi:train: cd integrations/jacbz-lofi && MLPY=../../.venv-ml311/bin/python; [ -x "$MLPY" ] || MLPY=../../.venv-ml/bin/python; [ -x "$MLPY" ] || MLPY=$(command -v python3); "$MLPY" -m model.lyrics2lofi_train
scripts.ml:model:dataset:build: cd integrations/jacbz-lofi/model/dataset && MLPY=../../../../.venv-ml311/bin/python; [ -x "$MLPY" ] || MLPY=../../../../.venv-ml/bin/python; [ -x "$MLPY" ] || MLPY=$(command -v python3); "$MLPY" preprocessor.py
scripts.ml:model:lofi2lofi:quicktrain: cd integrations/jacbz-lofi && MLPY=../../.venv-ml311/bin/python; [ -x "$MLPY" ] || MLPY=../../.venv-ml/bin/python; [ -x "$MLPY" ] || MLPY=$(command -v python3); MAX_EPOCHS=1 "$MLPY" -m model.lofi2lofi_train
